content:textarea:6:66.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:6:66.html: The Salvation Army helps Oconee residents in need of clothing. We utilize our Salvation Army Family Store in Seneca to provide vouchers for free clothing to those in emergency need. Applications for assistance are done by appointment only. Required documents are listed below.
